allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(v[-1] if isinstance\(v,list\) else v\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\); stable=[x for x in v if 'beta' not in x and 'alpha' not in x]; print\('\\n'.join\(stable[-5:]\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(type\(v\).__name__\); print\(v[-5:] if isinstance\(v,list\) else v\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; v=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pg16=[x for x in v if x.startswith\('16.'\)]; print\(pg16[-3:] if pg16 else 'none'\); pg15=[x for x in v if x.startswith\('15.'\)]; print\(pg15[-3:] if pg15 else 'none'\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('main:', p.get\('main'\)\); print\('exports:', json.dumps\(p.get\('exports','none'\), indent=2\)[:300]\); print\('type:', p.get\('type','commonjs'\)\)")
